title: Mother-in-law captured abroad after cold-blooded execution of beauty queen daughter-in-law
description: Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, inside her Mexico City apartment on April 15.
content:
The mother-in-law of a one-time Mexican beauty queen has been arrested for her murder after fleeing the country. 
Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of … [+3762 chars]
de: Schwiegermutter im Ausland gefangen genommen, nachdem die Schwiegertochter der Schönheitskönigin kaltblütig hingerichtet wurde. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, wurde am Mittwoch in Venezuela wegen des Femizids an Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, in ihrer Wohnung in Mexiko-Stadt am 15. April verhaftet.
en: Mother-in-law captured abroad after cold-blooded execution of beauty queen daughter-in-law. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, inside her Mexico City apartment on April 15.
la: Socrus foris cepit post supplicium pulchritudinis reginae nurus frigidae. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, in Venezuela die Mercurii ob femicidam Carolinae Flores Gomez comprehensus est, 27. intra eam in urbe Mexici conclavis die XV Aprilis.
